decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/8 sessions consistent. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 mentioned preference updates but did not explicitly flag the assumption conflict. Session 9 did NOT update preferences model. Session 9 did NOT implement multi-channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 11/1937 lines reworked (0.6%, 42/50). 0/29 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.1% (14/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 30. Session 8: 35 (process:20 efficiency:12 ttfw:3). Session 9: 25 (process:20 efficiency:5 ttfw:0). Session 10: 32 (process:20 efficiency:12 ttfw:0). Session 11: 26 (process:20 efficiency:5 ttfw:1). Session 12: 30 (process:20 efficiency:7 ttfw:3).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 176/176 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters share interface: NotificationAdapter. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 11/15 (naming=mixed, types=exported, methods=consistent).
